NIBSDescription: Single- and paired-pulse (SICI) TMS over left primary motor cortex with concurrent EMG from the right first dorsal interosseous muscle. Intensities are set relative to the resting motor threshold (RMT).

ThresholdSet.Criterion: MEP amplitude >= 50 uV in at least 5 of 10 consecutive trials
ThresholdSet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous

event_id.Description: Identifier of a stimulation event type with a unique parameter set. Linked to event_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

stimulator_id.Description: Device that generates the stimulus waveform. Links to StimulatorSet.StimulatorID.

element_id.Description: Element that delivers the stimulation. Links to ElementSet.ElementID.

stimulus_shape.Description: Waveform shape of the base stimulus.

Levels.Monophasic: Monophasic pulse as per stimulator setting

first_inflection.Description: Direction of the first deflection of the induced current; corresponds to the normal/reverse current-direction setting on the stimulator.

stimulus_intensity.Description: Amplitude of the base stimulus. Set to n/a when intensity varies between pulses; per-pulse values are then given in pattern1_intensity.

stimulus_duration.Description: Time during which a contiguous non-zero current is applied through the coil (pulse width).

pattern1_count.Description: Number of base stimuli in one pattern1 unit.

pattern1_interval.Description: Onset-to-onset interval between consecutive base stimuli.

pattern1_intensity.Description: Intensity of each successive stimulus in pattern1 when it changes between pulses (across repeats, over time). Number of values MUST equal pattern1_count. Used only when stimulus_intensity is n/a.

threshold_id.Description: Thresholding method used to set the intensity for this event. Links to ThresholdSet.ThresholdID.

threshold_reference_intensity.Description: Device output corresponding to the threshold named in threshold_id (e.g. the RMT value), allowing intensities to be expressed relative to threshold.
